content: BaseTable is a low-level headless table component from @gravity-ui/table built on top of TanStack Table. It provides full rendering control through a TanStack table instance. Supports sticky header and footer, row grouping, row virtualization via TanStack Virtualizer, custom row and cell rendering, resize handles, and sort indicators. Import: import {BaseTable} from '@gravity-ui/table';

BaseTable props: table (Table<TData>, required) TanStack Table instance; attributes (React.TableHTMLAttributes) HTML attributes for the table element; bodyAttributes, bodyClassName, bodyRef attributes for tbody; cellAttributes, cellClassName for body cells; className (string) CSS class for table; customFooterRowCount (number) number of custom footer rows; emptyContent (React.ReactNode) content when no rows; footerAttributes, footerCellAttributes, footerCellClassName, footerClassName, footerRowAttributes, footerRowClassName for footer; getGroupTitle (function) returns group header row title; getIsCustomRow (function) identifies custom rows; getIsGroupHeaderRow (function) identifies group header rows; groupHeaderClassName for group headers; headerAttributes, headerCellAttributes, headerCellClassName, headerClassName, headerRowAttributes, headerRowClassName for header; onRowClick (function) row click handler; renderCustomFooterContent, renderCustomRowContent, renderGroupHeader, renderGroupHeaderRowContent, renderHeaderCellContent, renderResizeHandle, renderSortIndicator custom renderers; resizeHandleClassName, rowAttributes, rowClassName, rowVirtualizer (Virtualizer instance), sortIndicatorClassName; stickyFooter (boolean, default false); stickyHeader (boolean, default false); withFooter (boolean, default false); withHeader (boolean, default true).
BaseTable requires a TanStack Table instance created with useReactTable. Define columns with createColumnHelper or manually, then pass the table instance to BaseTable.
code_examples: No data} onRowClick={(row) => console.log(row.original)} />
